description:
No spec subject

Review CF4 (consensus: distributed M1 + spec + testing). The specled_-cpw attribution race can flip a tagged test to 'executed' strength, so build_v2's self_verified? boolean (coverage_closure.ex:588) reaches html.ex:2012's rollup badge unqualified — the one artifact in the chain that drops the ADR's own 'race-bounded, not exact' disclaimer. Cheap fix: observed/approx qualifier + title-attribute caveat on the badge and per-requirement row under :ok_per_test mode only (aggregate mode's 'linked' ceiling is already honest). Real fix (synchronous on_exit hook) stays specled_-cpw.
title: Qualify self_verified? rendering under :ok_per_test as observed/approximate
